final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing museum-style Chinese infographic for a Chinese ethnic minority costume technical breakdown.

Style/medium: needs a national museum exhibition panel aesthetic with archival illustration quality — exact illustration technique and line weight are yours
Composition: must be infographic layout with fixed 5-zone structure: top header, left structural breakdown zone, upper-right material/texture zone, mid-right pattern/color/symbolism zone, bottom wearing-order flowchart + summary
Subject: must include a realistic full-figure standing person wearing a complete ethnic minority costume as central focal element (or central exploded diagram if subject better suits object focus)
Scene/backdrop: must be museum archival paper texture in off-white / silk-white / pale tea color tones — exact paper grain and aging level are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a scholarly, restrained, professional atmosphere — exact lighting treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a sophisticated, muted, collectible palette emphasizing authentic materials — exact color mixing is yours
Materials/textures: needs realistic fabric weave, embroidery stitch, metal ornament, and leather texture samples — exact texture rendering technique is yours
Text (verbatim): must include Simplified Chinese throughout: 主标题 / 副标题 / 导语 at top; 引线标注 for structural components on left; 材质说明 / 工艺说明 in upper-right; 纹样样本 / 色彩板 / 文化寓意 in mid-right; 穿着顺序 / 构成流程图 / 核心特征总结 at bottom — all text must be clear, regular, readable Simplified Chinese with no garbled characters, errors, English, or pinyin
Constraints: must preserve the 5-zone layout structure; must include technical callouts with leader lines; must show material texture swatches; must display color palette with cultural explanations; must maintain museum-grade accuracy in costume structure and cultural annotations; must avoid poster/studio/e-commerce/anime/cosplay aesthetics; must avoid incorrect labels, blurred text, fake materials, or excessive decoration
Avoid: poster aesthetic, studio photography feel, e-commerce look, anime style, cosplay appearance, incorrect labeling, wrong structural diagrams, illegible text, fake material textures, over-decoration
